name: @openmaxai/claude-openmax
description: Claude Code runtime adapter for OpenMax/CWS — a Category-B (bare runtime) adapter that consumes @openmaxai/openmax-agent-sdk (CwsAgentBridge) and bridges inbound CWS messages into Claude Code's visible context via an experimental claude/channel MCP plugin + raft-channel-wake.v1 /wake, and exposes the SDK's six service clients (tm/kb/as/comm/core/conn) as MCP tools.
